prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Blades in the Dark / Doskvol inspired industrial gothic supernatural atlas for the terrain type diverse_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: a vast Void Sea world of many island groups and microcontinents under perpetual supernatural darkness, canal city-islands, lightning rail causeways, leaky industrial waterways, gang territory islands, deathlands isles, ghost-lit sectors, electroplasmic lightning towers, leviathan-blood refineries, smuggler coves and haunted factory ports.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated industrial gothic atlas, dark gaslamp cartography, soot-stained parchment, smog and fog, flickering gas lamps, electroplasmic blue lightning accents, criminal faction territory map mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait world map with unevenly distributed island clusters; include large industrial city islands, tiny smuggler islets, crescent island arcs, black lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote haunted atolls, fragmented cliffs and microcontinents with no grid-like spacing; include iron compass rose, gothic border, sea routes, rail causeways, gang boundary shading, lightning tower symbols and ghost-field marks without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must vary strongly in size and shape, with realistic complex coastlines, broken shores, curved bays, peninsulas, oily deltas, polluted estuaries, fjords, industrial docks and storm harbors; show many regions including walled cities, canal deltas, industrial marshes, dark forests, barren deathlands, cold highlands, haunted coastlines and polluted harbors.
Avoid: evenly spaced islands, bright heroic fantasy, clean steampunk optimism, cheerful tropical palette, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
